Nutrition and Dietetics

Career Opportunities

MENU

The role of nutrition in the prevention and treatment of diseases has been clearly demonstrated by scientific studies in recent years. In parallel with these developments, the profession of dietetics has rapidly evolved, and career opportunities for dietitians have expanded across various sectors such as healthcare, education, industry, and media.

Graduates of the Department of Nutrition and Dietetics can pursue careers with the title of Dietitian in the following fields:

Healthcare Sector

Clinical (therapeutic) dietitian in hospitals

Specializations such as diabetes, renal, oncology, and bariatric dietetics

Consultant dietitian in outpatient clinics and private practices

Nutrition in cardiovascular, gastrointestinal diseases, and pre/post-surgical care

Education and Public Sector

Educator dietitian in educational institutions

Maternal and child health centers

Community health dietitian in community health centers and relevant ministries

Nutrition services in banks and public institutions

Mass Catering and Management

Managerial dietitian in institutions

Catering companies and food production facilities

Hotels, restaurants, and food service businesses

Nursing homes and specialized care institutions

Food Industry and Sports

Product development in the food industry

Nutrition consultancy in advertising and marketing

Sports nutrition consultancy

Health clubs and fitness centers

Media and Academic Career

Nutrition writing in newspapers and magazines

Content production for radio and television programs

Academic careers at universities following Master’s and PhD education.

Our Department of Nutrition and Dietetics aims to prepare its students for this wide range of career opportunities by equipping them with

scientific knowledge, practical skills, and a strong sense of ethical responsibility

.
